extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ sprinted to victory on the uphill finish at Suances after BENNETT was dropped on minor climbs, reclaiming the red jersey via 10-second bonus.
tactical_patterns: MARTIN Guillaume attacked inside 1km for mountain points, revealing KOM jersey defense prioritized over stage result despite uphill finish.
MITCHELTON SCOTT controlled pace with SMITH Dion and STANNARD Robert to burn BENNETT on minor climbs before final 30km.
ROGLIČ targeted 10-second bonus on uphill finish to reclaim GC lead, showing GC teams willing to sprint punchy finales mid-race.

rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: negative: Dropped on minor climbs 30km out on stage designed for punchers, exposing vulnerability on anything beyond pure flat sprints.
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: Won uphill sprint after full stage of racing for third consecutive day, displaying exceptional condition before mountain weekend.
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: Lost 3 seconds on uphill finale despite being in position, showing less explosive kick than ROGLIČ on power finishes.
rider_signals.MARTIN Guillaume: neutral: Prioritized KOM points with late attack over stage placing, confirming classification hunting over stage wins.
rider_signals.GROßSCHARTNER Felix: positive: Second place on uphill finish suggests strong condition and potential breakaway threat on mountain stages ahead.
